techniques.evidence_quote: The activity identified used a compromised credential to access a Sumo Logic AWS account.
Immediately upon detection we locked down the exposed infrastructure and rotated every potentially exposed credential for our infrastructure out of an abundance of caution.

attack_chain.description: The attacker obtained or otherwise compromised a credential associated with Sumo Logic's AWS account, enabling them to authenticate as a legitimate cloud identity.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The activity identified used a compromised credential to access a Sumo Logic AWS account.

attack_chain.description: Using the compromised credential, the attacker accessed the Sumo Logic AWS environment. Sumo Logic's response implies the attacker had visibility into cloud infrastructure, prompting a full lockdown and rotation of all potentially exposed credentials.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Immediately upon detection we locked down the exposed infrastructure and rotated every potentially exposed credential for our infrastructure out of an abundance of caution.

initial_access_vector: Compromised credential used to access a Sumo Logic AWS account, discovered on November 3, 2023.
persistence_mechanism: Attacker leveraged the compromised cloud account credential to maintain access to the AWS environment until detected and locked down.
privilege_escalation: Not described in the source text.
